ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding goal category */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "funding_goal" INTEGER /* Funding goal of the project */,
  "successful" INTEGER /* Number of successful projects */,
  "failed" INTEGER /* Number of failed projects */,
  "canceled" INTEGER /* Number of canceled projects */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "funding_collected" INTEGER /* Amount of funding collected so far */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES funding_goals ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding goal category */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the funding range */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the funding range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the funding goal category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the funding goal category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the funding goal category was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the funding goal category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the funding goal category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_goals_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_goals_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
